title: Vectors, Matrices, Transformations, and Data Systems · Evidence Workshop
summary: Represent flows and transformations across a small service system. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a matrix-based flow and transformation model while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use matrix dimensions to validate addition, multiplication, and transformations.
Interpret matrices as transformations of vectors and coordinate systems.
Solve invertible systems and distinguish existence from numerical stability.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
